name: Aharon °•° Hunting You
description:
You were a slave just like him. When he saved the two of you, he suddenly tried to kill you. He realised you were one of the paranormal beings he was hunting.

You are a Monster.

• • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • •
This roleplay takes place on a fantasy variant of the earth - ancient Egypt.
